findings.title: Core functionality mapped
findings.recommendation: Tech stack identified for targeted analysis

findings.title: Source/test organization could be clearer
findings.impact: May indicate mixed concerns or no test structure
findings.recommendation: Organize code into src/, test/, and config/ directories

findings.title: Documentation present (README)
findings.impact: Project is documented for users and developers

findings.title: No code style configuration found
findings.impact: May result in inconsistent code style across files
findings.recommendation: Add .eslintrc, pylintrc, or similar style configuration

findings.title: No testing configuration found
findings.impact: Lack of automated tests increases bug risk
findings.recommendation: Set up Jest, pytest, Mocha, or similar test framework

findings.title: Large source files detected (1 files > 10KB)
findings.impact: Large files may indicate high cyclomatic complexity
findings.recommendation: Consider breaking large files into smaller, focused modules

findings.title: .gitignore configured
findings.impact: Prevents accidental commits of sensitive files

findings.title: No automated security scanning detected
findings.recommendation: Enable Dependabot or Snyk for automated vulnerability scanning

critical_actions.action: Organize code into src/, test/, and config/ directories
Set up Jest, pytest, Mocha, or similar test framework
Enable Dependabot or Snyk for automated vulnerability scanning
